message:
fix(sync): disable JSONL auto-flush in dolt-native mode (bd-zlih1)

ShouldExportJSONL() was hardcoded to return true for all modes.
In dolt-native mode, JSONL should not be written - all sync happens
via Dolt remotes. Now returns false for dolt-native mode.

The auto-flush check in flushToJSONLWithState() already existed but
was never triggered because ShouldExportJSONL() always returned true.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
Rig: beads
Role: crew
